level_1.claim: The Big Bang singularity is a temporal-horizon limit in the distance/acoustic sector.

level_1.name: Temporal-Horizon Reinterpretation

description: Automated claim gate for temporal-horizon cosmology
interpretation: TEP-TH achieves Level 3 claim: Full Big-Bang Replacement

bbn_preservation.description: BBN light-element abundances preserved (Y_p, D/H, He3/H, Li7/H, N_eff)

blackbody_preservation.description: CMB blackbody spectrum preserved without spectral distortions

cmb_anisotropy_match.description: CMB TT/TE/EE anisotropy spectra match Planck within observational tolerance

curvature_boundedness.description: Matter-frame curvature invariants remain bounded near horizon

entropy_regularity.description: Entropy and arrow-of-time regularity maintained at horizon

geodesic_non_termination.description: Null and timelike geodesics do not terminate at finite affine/proper time

lss_bao_match.description: Matter power spectrum, growth factor, and BAO scales match SDSS/BOSS

perturbation_boundary.description: Primordial perturbation boundary condition is well-defined

recombination_visibility.description: Recombination visibility function and acoustic scales preserved

singularity_theorem_evasion.description: SEC violation evades Hawking-Penrose singularity theorems
